inapplicable_to_compact_only_bundle.classic-sfm: requires sparse scene points plus RGB for point colors
inapplicable_to_compact_only_bundle.depth: requires RGB depth inference or supplied depth maps
inapplicable_to_compact_only_bundle.hybrid: requires depth plus dense RGB photometric targets

not_public_arms.field-placement-fallback: an emergency fallback is a failure, not an initializer arm

diagnostics.analytic_semantics: untruncated density/RGB-numerator proxy; validate normalized teacher separately
